color-text-primary.$description: Reflects the text.primary variable from the theme object

color-text-secondary.$description: Reflects the text.secondary variable from the theme object

color-text-disabled.$description: Reflects the text.disabled variable from the theme object

color-text-hover.$description: Used for hover states. The token represents the value of action.hoverOpacity (0.04 by default) of the main token.

color-text-selected.$description: Used for selected states. The token represents the value of action.selectedOpacity (0.08 by default) of the main token.

color-text-focus.$description: Used for focus states. The token represents the value of action.focusOpacity (0.12 by default) of the main token.

color-text-focusVisible.$description: Used for focus visible states. The token represents the value of focusVisibleOpacity (0.3 by default) of the main token.

color-primary-main.$description: Reflects the primary.main variable from the theme object

color-primary-dark.$description: Used for hover states. Reflects the primary.dark variable from the theme object

color-primary-light.$description: Reflects the primary.light variable from the theme object

color-primary-contrast.$description: Reflects the primary.contrast variable from the theme object. Color that keeps a contrast ratio above AA when XX.main is used as a bg. color

color-primary-hover.$description: Used for hover states. The token represents the value of action.hoverOpacity (0.04 by default) of the main token.

color-primary-selected.$description: Used for selected states. The token represents the value of action.selectedOpacity (0.08 by default) of the main token.

color-primary-focus.$description: Used for focus states. The token represents the value of action.focusOpacity (0.12 by default) of the main token.

color-primary-outlinedBorder.$description: Used for enabled states (e.g Button outlined variant). The token represents the value of outlinedBorderOpacity (0.5 by default) of the main token.

color-secondary-hover.$description: Used for hover states. The token represents the value of action.hoverOpacity (0.04 by default) of the main token.

color-secondary-outlinedBorder.$description: Used for enabled states (e.g Button outlined variant). The token represents the value of outlinedBorderOpacity (0.5 by default) of the main token.
